# function: range_to_cidrs

Converts an inclusive IP range `[first_ip, last_ip]` into the minimal list of CIDRs that exactly covers the range. Both IPs must be the same address family (IPv4 or IPv6).



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
range_to_cidrs(first_ip string, last_ip string) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `first_ip` (String) The first (lowest) IP address in the range.
1. `last_ip` (String) The last (highest) IP address in the range.
